justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted "after-tomorrow at 10h" as May 27th and subsequent temporal requests, demonstrating accurate understanding throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternative times and dates when the user's preferred slot was unavailable, offering relevant options without being overly pushy.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently handled the conversation by immediately checking availability and proposing alternatives without unnecessary turns or redundant information requests.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was smooth and professional, with the agent maintaining a helpful tone and successfully booking the appointment without any friction points.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent demonstrated excellent recovery quality by maintaining full context and intelligently expanding the search for available slots after each rejection without re-asking for information.
